name: Vieiras a La Gallega- Scallops in Mustard-ol
recipeInstructions:
Cook's notes: Green olives stuffed with anchovies are available at stores that specialize in imported foods, such as Cost Plus.
Preliminaries: Preheat oven to 350 degrees. Procedure:
Heat olive oil in a medium skillet over medium heat. Add garlic and scallops, cooking for 5 minutes until the scallops are lightly golden on both sides.
Add chopped olives (and anchovies if using them separately), capers, mustard, cream, and butter. Cook over medium heat for an additional 8 to 10 minutes, stirring occasionally, until the sauce has reduced by half.
Spoon scallops into individual scallop shells or onto a small ovenproof dish. Sprinkle with bread crumbs. Bake in the preheated oven at 350 degrees for about 2 to 3 minutes, watching carefully to prevent burning.
